- Tartrate-resistant acid phosphatase (TRAP) test is specific for histiocytic disorders, such as multiple myeloma or histiocytic sarcoma, but more importantly, it is used to diagnose and differentiate between conditions like multiple myeloma and other bone marrow disorders.
